messages.content: 请你为我翻译接下来我给你发送的段落
好的,我准备好了。请发送您需要翻译的段落给我,我会为您进行翻译。

We determine the number of examples in the context window by using an estimate of the number of tokens required for each per example, for the general task instructions, and for the specific question. Following Yen et al. [2024], we compute these averages using the Llama 2 tokenizer, and use approximately 500K tokens of context for each estimate. We then estimate the number of examples to use by determining how many average-length examples would reach 95% of the target context length. We sample a distribution over the label classes so that the model cannot use any information about the true distribution over labels (e.g., by guessing that most sentiment classification datasets are balanced). Then, we sample examples to fill this distribution; if there are less total examples than required, we sample with replacement. For each instance, we sample a date and user ID. User IDs are drawn such that 80% of instances have an ID in the 20% of IDs that are most common. Dates are drawn uniformly with replacement from an approximately 40-month range. Once a context window is constructed, we use it for 25 questions; reusing the same context window allows for prompt caching, reducing the time to evaluate local models and the cost to evaluate on most APIs. At each context length, we sample two context windows per dataset, for a total of 50 questions per dataset or 400 total questions in the test split per context length. We construct OOLONG-synth questions for every power of 2 from 1K to 4M.

我们通过估算每个示例所需的token数量、通用任务指令以及具体问题所需的token数量，来确定上下文窗口中的示例数量。参照Yen等人[2024]的方法，我们使用Llama 2分词器计算这些平均值，并为每次估算使用大约50万个token的上下文。然后，我们通过确定多少个平均长度的示例能达到目标上下文长度的95%，来估算需要使用的示例数量。我们对标签类别进行分布采样，使模型无法利用关于标签真实分布的任何信息（例如，通过猜测大多数情感分类数据集是平衡的）。然后，我们采样示例来填充这个分布；如果总示例数少于所需数量，我们进行有放回采样。对于每个实例，我们采样一个日期和用户ID。用户ID的抽取方式是：80%的实例具有最常见的20%ID中的某个ID。日期从大约40个月的范围内均匀有放回地抽取。一旦构建好上下文窗口，我们将其用于25个问题；重复使用同一个上下文窗口可以实现提示缓存，从而减少评估本地模型的时间和在大多数API上评估的成本。在每个上下文长度下，我们为每个数据集采样两个上下文窗口，因此每个数据集共有50个问题，或者说在每个上下文长度的测试集中共有400个问题。我们为从1K到4M的每个2的幂次方构建OOLONG-synth问题。
